title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.340 - State and local boards of education to administer law
text:
178.340.  State and local boards of education to administer law. — The state board of education is responsible for the execution of sections 178.300 to 178.360.  The local school boards or school authorities maintaining the instruction given are responsible for the local administration of the sections.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-34) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 162.240)
